title.en: Therefore, this one was naturally kicked out of...

content.en:
When he learned that Ye Tian had gathered millions of battle points in a very short period of time, killed many emperors of other tribes, and even killed the emperor list powerhouses of other tribes, this kind of strength was enough to rank among the top of the emperor list.

As a result, the ancient demon-level existences of the Aromu Fortress included Ye Tian in the emperor list for the first time, and eliminated the last place from the emperor list, after all, the emperor list powerhouse had accumulated enough records over countless years, but in fact, his combat strength was not good, and he had always been ranked last.

Therefore, this one was naturally kicked out of the emperor list.

After entering the emperor list, it will no longer be ranked by record points, but by real record scores, and there will be a treasure to deduce the ranking of the emperor list.

Ye Tian only needs to go through many battles and show terrifying strength, and his ranking will continue to improve.

On the contrary, if there is no dazzling record, the ranking will continue to decline, and you may even be kicked out of the emperor list.

After entering the Emperor List of the Arrowmu Fortress, Ye Tian could obtain benefits, and soon the benefits were delivered.

He could enter the Emperor Tower of the Aromu Fortress for cultivation, where the ultimate particle energy was dozens of times that of the outside world.

At the same time, the Emperor Bang can also be eligible to exchange for some special resources of the Aromu Fortress, as well as some special secret methods.

And the biggest benefit of entering the Emperor List is the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space.

Of course, it is not easy to project the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, and it takes a lot of money to pay, so it takes a long time to comprehend once, and the time for comprehension is not long.

If he was kicked out of the emperor list during the period of enlightenment, then there would be no way to participate in enlightenment.

Therefore, when it is time to comprehend the projection of the ancient magic pillar of time and space, all the powerhouses of the emperor list will do their best to keep their rankings.

You don't need to worry about the top ranking, but the last dozens of people in the ranking will be worried.

At this time, it is not far from the next time to comprehend the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space.

Therefore, the emperor who was kicked out was in a hurry.

......

Somewhere in the fortress of Arromu.

The residence of an emperor.

Kuse was very angry and kept attacking the surroundings, but this was the Aromu Fortress, even if it was an ancient demon-level existence, it couldn't hurt it in the slightest.

"Damn, I'm about to comprehend the space-time ancient demon pillar projection, but I was kicked out, who replaced me and entered the emperor list~~?"

Cousse said angrily.

He looked at the emperor list, and only knew that the other party was an emperor called Tian, but he didn't know anything else.

So, he hurriedly went to ask people to find out the news about the sky.

Soon, some information was delivered to him.

"Coming from a tribe that is not very strong, but it has gathered a million battle points in a short period of time, this is ......"

Cousei is not stupid, he understands what this means, unlike his luck to reach the standard of the Emperor List, this day definitely has extremely strong strength, and it is not something he can provoke.

was kicked out of the Emperor List, and if he wanted to enter the Emperor List again, he couldn't rely on his record points, he had to defeat a strong man on the Emperor List before he could enter the Emperor List again.

In short, he didn't dare to choose Ye Tian, because such an opportunity was only once, and he had to make a careful choice and choose the weakest Emperor List powerhouse.

......

"100,000 battle points were exchanged for a drop of ancient demon-level blood!"

Ye Tian looked at the drop of Ancient Demon-level blood in front of him, revealing excitement, this was not an ordinary Ancient Demon-level blood, but a peak Ancient Demon-level blood, and it still came from a peak Ancient Demon-level existence who had cultivated the True Lin Form to the fourth form.

It can be said that it is only the main department of the mother of Aro that can get such a drop of ancient demon-level blood, and others will definitely not be able to get it.

Ye Tian spent 100,000 battle points, and the peak Ancient Demon level of the main department of Ah Luo's mother found that Ancient Demon level existence and obtained a drop of blood, which was used to study the True Lin form for Ye Tian.

If he was lucky, he might be able to use this drop of ancient demon-level blood to master the second form of the True Lin Form.

In the days that followed, he occasionally went to hunt some emperor-level powerhouses and complete group tasks of the Dragon Disciple Battle Group, and the rest of the time was spent contemplating this drop of ancient demon-level blood.

Through this drop of Ancient Demon-level blood, Ye Tian spied a trace of the second form or even the third form of the True Lin Form, and it was this trace that made Ye Tian feel a lot of mysteries, which was very helpful for him to cultivate the True Lin Form.

Time flies.

After countless attempts and drills, Ye Tian finally cultivated the True Lin Form to the First Form Perfection Realm, and was about to practice into the Second Form.

On the other hand, the power of his Ultimate Rule Realm Prototype has also skyrocketed, and the gap between him and comprehending the true Ultimate Rule Realm is not very big.

And he has exchanged a lot of resources that can strengthen the ultimate will, and now he has also improved in terms of ultimate will, which is comparable to the ultimate will of ordinary emperor list powerhouses.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current strength far surpasses that of the past, reaching an extremely terrifying level.

this day.

Ye Tian's True Lin Form finally broke through, and he successfully cultivated the second form of the True Lin Form, the Red Lin Form.

Compared to the first form of the Qinglin form, the red form is red all over, and there are even invisible flames burning, but the body size is much smaller than the Qinglin form.

"'What a powerful force!!!

Ye Tian was shocked.

At this moment, his strength has gained terrifying strength, in the past, he had at most the strength of about ten on the Emperor List of the Arrowmother Fortress, and now he probably has the strength of the top five, or even the top three.

If he comprehended the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm again, he would even have a chance to compete for the first place.

After breaking through Zhao's strength, Ye Tian naturally wanted to kill a group of emperor-level powerhouses from other main departments.

This time, he was ready to go further afield.

Along the way, he encountered the emperor-level of other main departments, and he was directly killed, and occasionally encountered ancient demon-level existences of other main departments, but he always fled as soon as possible and did not fight with these ancient demon-level existences.

Maybe he can defeat the weaker Ancient Demon level existence now, but it is still not very easy to kill the opponent, and there is no need to expose his strength.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered the emperor of Dom Fortress - Mu He!

Mu Henai is the eighty-third emperor powerhouse in the Dom Fortress Emperor List, much stronger than Wei Wei, but far inferior to Aoi Still.

Rumble!!!

Mu He also recognized Ye Tian, after all, the emperor list powerhouses of the major main fortresses, the major main departments have information and materials, and once they enter the emperor list, they will be completely famous.
